entity_types.name: Variants
entity_types.description: Genetic variants: SNPs, InDels, CNVs, structural variants

entity_types.name: Genes
entity_types.description: Genes, genomic sequences, and related annotations

entity_types.name: Proteins
entity_types.description: Proteins, isoforms, peptides, and functional annotations

entity_types.name: Transcriptomics
entity_types.description: Transcripts, isoforms, and RNA expression profiles

entity_types.name: Epigenomics
entity_types.description: DNA methylation, histone marks, and chromatin states

entity_types.name: Pathways
entity_types.description: Biological pathways, networks, and molecular interactions

entity_types.name: Gene Ontology
entity_types.description: GO terms: molecular function, biological process, cellular component

entity_types.name: Diseases
entity_types.description: Disease entities, classifications, and associated phenotypes

entity_types.name: Chemicals
entity_types.description: Chemical compounds, drugs, and environmental substances (identity: CAS, InChI, SMILES)

entity_types.name: Phenotypes
entity_types.description: Observable traits, HPO terms, and GWAS associations

entity_types.name: Exposome
entity_types.description: Measured environmental exposures: route, media, units (NHANES, CDC)

entity_types.name: Metabolomics
entity_types.description: Metabolites and small molecules measured as biochemical exposures (open: may move to Genomics)

entity_types.name: Microbiome
entity_types.description: Microbial species and communities sequenced from host samples (open: may move to Exposome)

entity_types.name: Anatomy
entity_types.description: Anatomical entities: organs, tissues, regions, and structures from the UBERON ontology
